result.stderr:
AssistStudio Runner — Headless LLM task automation engine

Usage:
  assiststudio-runner [serve]              Start MCP server (stdio)
  assiststudio-runner exec <task-id>       Execute a task headlessly
  assiststudio-runner config <subcommand>  Manage credentials and configuration

Exit codes (exec mode):
  0  Succeeded
  1  Failed
  2  Timed out
  3  Task not found
  4  Already running
